## Overview

Jared Kaplan is a researcher known for his foundational work on neural scaling laws at OpenAI.

## Key Facts

- Co-authored "Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models" (2020)
- Affiliated with OpenAI and Johns Hopkins University

## Source Appearances

- [Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models](../sources/scaling-laws-neural-lm.md) — lead author
